mapper.select:
SELECT s.id, s.name, p.name AS position_name FROM staff s LEFT JOIN staff_orginfo so ON so.id = ( SELECT so2.id FROM staff_orginfo so2 WHERE so2.staff_id = s.id AND (so2.deleted = 0 OR so2.deleted IS NULL) AND so2.position_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY so2.add_time DESC, so2.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) LEFT JOIN position p ON p.id = so.position_id AND (p.deleted = 0 OR p.deleted IS NULL) WHERE (s.deleted = 0 OR s.deleted IS NULL)
AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY s.add_time DESC, s.id DESC
